productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear! Product Details Tan brown shoe with central lace-ups, with overlays A padded tongue and inner Stitched detailing for style Tough rubber outsole Thick TPU outsole has multi-directional lugs Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
